title: Crafted armor is OP
description: Craft invincible Netherite gear using simple materials like leather or iron. Each piece features level 1,000,000 enchantments and infinite durability for total immortality.
body:
# 👑 Crafted Armor is OP! Become a Minecraft God! 👑
Tired of losing your hardcore worlds to a stray Creeper? Want to speedrun like an absolute legend, or just want to see what it feels like to be completely invincible? You are in the right place!
Welcome to **Crafted Armor is OP**, the ultimate data pack designed to turn your standard survival experience into a ridiculously overpowered sandbox.
### ✨ Why You Will Love This Data Pack:
 * **Zero Grinding, Maximum Power:** Forget mining for Ancient Debris in the dangerous Nether. You can use **any** standard armor crafting recipe (Leather, Iron, Gold, or Diamond) and the output will automatically be Netherite!
 * **Level 1,000,000 Enchantments:** Yes, you read those zeros correctly. Your newly crafted gear comes pre-loaded with reality-breaking enchantments, including Protection, Blast Protection, Thorns, and more.
 * **Literally Unbreakable:** Your new armor has the "Unbreakable" tag. It will outlast the universe itself.
 * **The Speedrunner's Dream:** Perfectly tailored for modded speedruns or for making casual survival a breeze.

![Vh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c0f8b0b3ba820aae0abac1add4274b8870646e3.png)

### 🛠️ How It Works
It is incredibly simple to become immortal:
 1. Gather the most basic materials (even a few cows for Leather will do!).
 2. Place them in your crafting table using the standard armor shapes.
 3. Pull out your **God-Tier Netherite Armor** and laugh in the face of the Wither.

![Hh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1967ae3aff028a02a0b7d5eb23a454d5a4e586f.jpeg)

### 🎮 How Will You Test Your Immortality?
Now that nothing can hurt you, what will you do? We challenge you to try these out once you craft your armor:
 * **The Lava Lounge:** Take a casual, relaxing swim across the bottom of a Nether lava lake.
 * **The Creeper Hugger:** Find a supercharged Creeper and let it explode right next to you.
 * **The Thorns Test:** Stand perfectly still in a zombie horde and watch them defeat themselves instantly against your Level 1,000,000 Thorns enchantment.
*Drop a comment below and let us know what crazy stunts you pulled off with this armor!*

**I hope you like it!!**
**Thanks for visiting me!!!**

_**----Made by Error6119----**_
